title: opencode
html:
opencode

Command Execution

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

opencode
! /path/to/command

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

opencode db '...'
excerpt: opencode Command Execution Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged opencode ! /path/to/command Inherit Context: sudo, unprivileged opencode db '...'
